summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of HawkNetic Predictor Tools dashboard. All 5 backend endpoints work as specified (9/9 pytest tests passing). Frontend renders the dashboard with the correct branding, all 6 required data-testid attributes are present, all 7 seeded games appear in the sidebar, clicking a game updates the market board, clicking an odds button adds a leg to the Algorithm Run slip, and pressing Run Algorithm fires POST /api/slips/analyze (200) and renders a full verdict UI (PASS, model win 45%, market implied 48%, edge -2.6%, EV $-0.55, fair odds 122, confidence HIGH).

issues: Subtitle still reads 'Build a market slate the way you would on Bet365, then press Run Algorithm...' — the word 'Bet365' is retained as a reference. The 'Data source' dropdown also labels its default option 'Reference market (Bet365 lines)'. The problem statement said the UI should NOT contain 'Bet365', so flag for main agent: decide whether to keep these as legitimate context (the platform compares against Bet365 lines) or scrub them. 'Bet Slip' is correctly removed everywhere.

action_items: Optional: decide whether to remove the remaining 'Bet365' textual references (header subtitle + 'Reference market (Bet365 lines)' dropdown option) since the problem statement asked for no 'Bet365' wording. Functionally everything is correct.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend test file requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var; CI/devs must export it (already set in /app/frontend/.env). Consider adding a conftest.py that reads it from /app/frontend/.env automatically.

The /api/slips/analyze response includes nulls (modelWinProbability/edgePct) when a leg has no model data (e.g., when gameId is provided but the seed has no probabilistic model for that selection). UI handles this correctly by showing 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA', but consider documenting the contract for callers.
Frontend description text mentions 'Bet365' which contradicts the stated rebranding goal — easy copy fix.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all required testids present, full Run Algorithm flow works with verdict rendering)

test_credentials: Not required — dashboard endpoints are unauthenticated.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing seed (7 games, 25 props, 8 odds) verified intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) pytest /app/backend/tests/test_hawknetic_api.py -v. Test file covers /api/health, /api/games (7), /api/props (25), /api/odds (8), and POST /api/slips/analyze with verdict-structure assertions. The frontend e2e flow validated: select game in sports-board → odds button in market-board adds leg to algorithm-slip → run-algorithm-button calls /api/slips/analyze and renders verdict. Sample successful response for a moneyline leg with gameId='3' selection='Philadelphia 76ers' returned recommendation='PASS' with full metrics (model 45%, edge -2.6%, EV -0.55, fair odds 122).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs blocking the listed acceptance criteria. The only deviation from the spec is the textual presence of 'Bet365' in two cosmetic spots (header subtitle and dropdown label), which is a copy decision rather than a defect.
